title: Large Coat Cover with Viewing Window| Extra Long Hanging Travel Garment Protector Storage Bag/Cover with Zip for Long Coats/Jackets/Dresses/Skirts| Dust Proof, Waterproof Garment|110 X 60 X 10 CM
features: Large size Coat Bags 110 X 60 X 10CM
Ideal for Long Coats, Jackets, Dresses, Skirts, Trousers
Random Colour from Blue, Black, Grey etc
Brilliant way of keeping clothes dust, odour and shower proof
Can be used at house in cupboards for storage and even while travelling
Lightweight, breathable dress bag, ideal for wardrobe, for travel and for storage
Cheap enough to be able to use for individual garments and prevent creasing
description: These Coat/Jacket/ Dress Bags are suitable for a wide range of clothing and help to keep clothes clean and pristine when travelling or while being stored. Each bag is constructed from non-woven polypropylene and is complete with a front zip and a Viewing Window.
